title: FDA Approves Viridian Eye Drug, Challenging Amgen Tepezza
headline: FDA approves Viridian Therapeutics' eye drug, setting up a direct competitive challenge to Amgen's Tepezza in thyroid eye disease.
key_facts: FDA approval reported June 26, 2026; veligrotug anti-IGF-1R antibody; direct challenge to Amgen's Tepezza (teprotumumab); first approved TED therapy competition

title: Biogen Cuts Most Apellis Pipeline After $5.6B Acquisition
headline: After buying Apellis for $5.6 billion, Biogen is cutting most of its pipeline work.
key_facts: $5.6 billion Apellis acquisition; Biogen cutting most Apellis pipeline programs; complement-targeting platform; Syfovre for geographic atrophy lead asset; suggests acquisition primarily for Syfovre commercial revenue

title: Ionis Hits Commercial Inflection with Tryngolza Pancreatitis Approval
headline: FDA grants Ionis expanded approval for Tryngolza, making it the first treatment to reduce risk of acute pancreatitis in severe hypertriglyceridemia.
key_facts: FDA expanded approval June 25, 2026; Tryngolza first approved for acute pancreatitis risk reduction in severe hypertriglyceridemia; analysts call it potential multibillion-dollar medicine; platform monetization inflection for Ionis

title: Merck KGaA Acquires Bio-Techne for $11.3 Billion
headline: Merck KGaA makes its largest deal in a decade with $11.3 billion acquisition of Bio-Techne for life sciences services.
key_facts: Deal value $11.3 billion; Merck KGaA's largest deal in 10 years; life sciences tools and services acquisition; distinct from Merck & Co.

title: EU Probes Sanofi for Alleged Flu Vaccine Smear Campaign
headline: European Commission opens antitrust probe into Sanofi's flu shot marketing campaign allegedly disparaging a rival vaccine.
key_facts: June 26, 2026 report; European Commission antitrust probe; Sanofi flu vaccine franchise; rare antitrust action over vaccine marketing conduct

title: CHMP Reverses Endorsement of Amgen's Tavneos
headline: Europe's CHMP reverses endorsement of Amgen's Tavneos and recommends marketing authorization revocation.
key_facts: CHMP reversed previous support for Tavneos (avacopan); recommends marketing authorization revocation; significant blow to Amgen rare disease portfolio

title: FDA Accepts Replimune Filing; Advisory Panels Returning
headline: FDA accepts Replimune's application for oncolytic immunotherapy and schedules advisory panel meetings.
key_facts: Replimune filing accepted; described as latest example of changing FDA attitudes; FDA advisory panels returning with scheduled meetings; panels also scheduled for Capricor Therapeutics

title: At BIO Conference: China Deal Tensions and IPO Optimism
headline: At the BIO conference, tension over China biotech deal regulation looms while investors see an open IPO window.
key_facts: BIO conference coverage; tension over blanket bans on Chinese company deals; IPO optimism; 2026 class includes five of six largest biotech IPOs since start of 2022; Pfizer Seagen deal described as souring further; Akeso pushes back on ASCO questioning

title: Supreme Court Ruling Blunts Bayer Roundup Litigation
headline: Supreme Court ruling blunts state-level claims against Bayer's Roundup weedkiller.
key_facts: SCOTUS ruling June 25, 2026; favorable for Bayer; limits state-level litigation exposure; Roundup litigation backdrop

title: Personnel Moves: Arrakis CEO Retires, Skovronsky Joins Illumina Board
headline: Michael Gilman retires as Arrakis CEO; Daniel Skovronsky joins Illumina's board of directors.
key_facts: Michael Gilman retirement from Arrakis CEO role June 26; Daniel Skovronsky joining Illumina board June 26; industry leadership transitions

title: Alkermes' Incoming CEO Outlines Competitive Plan
headline: Alkermes' incoming CEO outlines plan to compete with Lilly and Takeda.
key_facts: Alkermes incoming CEO announces competitive strategy vs. Lilly and Takeda; company positioning
